title: Neottianthe gymnadenioides
intro: There is no information about Neottianthe gymnadenioides.
taxonomy: Neottianthe gymnadenioides is a species of orchid, specifically belonging to the family Orchidaceae. It is a terrestrial orchid native to North America, and within the Orchidaceae family, it is classified under the subfamily Orchidoideae. The genus Neottianthe is a monotypic genus, containing only this single species. This classification indicates the species' unique characteristics and its position within the larger orchid family. Further study of Neottianthe gymnadenioides is needed to understand its phylogenetic relationships in greater detail.
uses: Neottianthe gymnadenioides, commonly known as the Gymnadenia orchid, is used in traditional medicine. Its roots are believed to possess antimicrobial properties, which can aid in wound healing and the treatment of infections. Additionally, the plant is used to treat various respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties. However, more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness in treating these conditions. Further studies are required to fully understand the plant's medicinal properties and potential uses.
